hero.title: Labarai

renewableExpansion.excerpt: Sabbin damar EPC na hasken rana da haɗin gwiwa don tallafawa canjin makamashin India da za a sabunta.

hero.subtitle: Fayilolin mu na samfurori da ayyuka yana samar da cikakkun maganganun da ke haifar da nasarar masana'antu, yana tabbatar da cewa kowane bangare na bukatunku na injiniya an rufe shi.

products.description: Cikakkun kewayon samfurori na lantarki da sarrafa da aka tsara don aminci, inganci, da babban aiki a muhallin masana'antu.

contact.description: Shirye ku don fara aikinku na gaba? Tuntuɓi ƙungiyarmu ta ƙwararru don maganganun keɓaɓɓu da shawarwarin ƙwararru.

about.label: Game da Mu
about.title: Maraba zuwa Powerton Engineering Pvt. Ltd.
about.description: Abokin huldarku mai aminci wajen ba da maganganun injiniya da ayyuka masu inganci. An kafa shi tare da hangen nesa na ƙarfafa masana'antu ta hanyar kirkire-kirkire da fifiko, mun ƙware wajen samar da cikakkun kewayon samfuran lantarki da kayan aiki.
about.visualDescription: Injiniyoyin Indiya masu ƙwarewa suna aiki akan tsarin sarrafa masana'antu da sarrafawa

seo.title: Powerton Engineering - Sarrafa Masana'antu da Allunan Sarrafawa | Indiya
seo.description: Jagoran masana'anta na allunan sarrafawa na lantarki, tsarin sarrafa masana'antu, da maganganun kayan aiki. Ayyukan injiniya na ƙwararru a duniya tare da gogewa sama da shekara 15.
seo.keywords: allunan sarrafawa na lantarki, sarrafa masana'antu, sarrafa tsari, kayan aiki, cibiyar sarrafa wutar lantarki, cibiyar sarrafa injuna, injiniyan lantarki, Indiya, Noida

cta.hmiDescription: Ƙwararrun mu na HMI na iya tsara mu'amalar mai amfani mai sauƙi don tsarin sarrafa ku na atomatik.
cta.needHeatingolutions: Kuna Buƙatar Maganganun Dumama na Masana'antu?
cta.heatingDescription: Ƙwararrun mu na dumama na iya tsara tsarin dumama na musamman don ayyukan masana'antar ku.
cta.diaphragmDescription: Injiniyoyin famfo namu na iya taimaka muku zaɓar famfon diaphragm mai dacewa don bukatun sarrafa sinadarai.
cta.calibrationDescription: Ƙwararrun daidaitawa namu suna tabbatar da kayan aikin ku sun cika matsayi mafi girman daidaici.
cta.expertDescription: Ƙwararrun injiniya namu na iya taimaka muku nemo cikakkun maganganu don bukatun sarrafa masana'antar ku.

seo.title: Sabis na Injiniya na Ƙwararru - Shigarwa, Kulawa da Sarrafa | Powerton Engineering
seo.description: Sabis na injiniya na musamman: shirye-shiryen PLC, tsarin SCADA, sarrafa masana'antu, shigar da paneli na lantarki, kulawa, daidaitawa, hanyoyin keɓancewa da sabis na EPC na hasken rana a duk faɗin Indiya.

cta.description: Tuntuɓe mu yau don hanyar injiniya ta musamman. Gungunmu yana shirye don taimakawa wajen kawo aikinku cikin rayuwa.

hero.title: Game da Powerton Engineering
hero.subtitle: Abokin huldarku mai aminci wajen ba da maganganun injiniya da ayyuka masu inganci tsawon sama da shekara 15.

story.title: Tafiyarmu da Hangen Nesa
story.description1: An kafa shi tare da hangen nesa na ƙarfafa masana'antu ta hanyar kirkire-kirkire da fifiko, Powerton Engineering ta yi girma ta zama jagoran samar da maganganun lantarki da kayan aiki a duk duniya.
story.description2: Daga babban ofishinmu a Noida, muna bauta abokan ciniki a duk ƙasar tare da cikakkun maganganun injiniya da suka haɗa da sarrafa tsari, kayan aiki, shigar da hasken rana, da ayyukan kulawa.

quality.title: Fifikon Inganci
quality.description: Mun ɗaure kanmu don samar da samfurori da ayyuka mafi girman inganci waɗanda suka zarce ma'aunin masana'antu.

customer.title: Mayar da Hankali ga Abokin Ciniki
customer.description: Abokan cinikinmu suna cikin zuciyar duk abin da muke yi. Muna aiki tare don fahimta da zarce tsammaninsu.

innovation.title: Kirkire-kirkiren Fasaha
innovation.description: Muna ci gaba da saka hannun jari a sabbin fasahohi da maganganun kirkire-kirkire don kasancewa gaba a yanayin masana'antu.

reliability.title: Dogara
reliability.description: Bayyanannun lambobin mu na isarwa a daidai lokaci da sabis mai dogara ya sa mu zama abokin hulda mai aminci.

hero.title: Ayyukanmu
hero.subtitle: Gano kyawun aikinmu ta hanyar sama da ayyuka 1200 da suka yi nasara a masana'antu daban-daban, suna nuna kirkire-kirkire, inganci da aminci.

custom.title: Kuna Buƙatar Fayil na Musamman?
custom.description: Kuna neman bayanan aikin musamman ko fayilin ayyuka na musamman don masana'antarku? Tuntuɓe ƙungiyarmu don samun takardun da aka keɓanta.

disclaimer.text: Ana ba da takardun fayilin ayyuka don dalilai na bayani ne kawai. Don bayanan da suka fi sabunta da cikakkun bayanan aiki, da fatan za a tuntuɓi ƙungiyarmu kai tsaye. Wasu bayanan ayyuka na iya zama sirri kuma ana samun su ne kawai ƙarƙashin NDA.

alert.contactMessage: Don samun damar zuwa takardun fayilin ayyukanmu, da fatan za a tuntuɓe mu kai tsaye a info@powertonengineering.com ko kira +91-94627-71662.
